title: Allahabad HC’s struggle to find advocate for murder convict in 1988 case prompts review of legal aid lawyers' list
description: The Allahabad High Court's struggle to find a lawyer for a murder convict in a 4-decade-old case has led to an order to review the list of lawyers empaneled by the State Legal Services Authority as legal aid counsel [Bhagwan Din & others v State] Since at least 2018, the Allahabad High Court struggled to find counsel for a murder convict whose criminal appeal has been pending on its docket for nearly four decadesFollowing their conviction in 1998, four convicts – Bhagwan Din, Guru Din,
